title: ziziphora glabella
intro: Ziziphora glabella, also known as the Persian copper pennywort or purple ziziphora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a herb used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ziziphora glabella include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
